title: WorkRelationshipStatusType
description: The status of the worker's relationship to an organization.

separatedIndicator.description: Indicates the worker has been separated from an organization.

declinedToProvideIndicator.description: Indicates the organization has declined to provide a status.

statusCode.description: The status of the worker's relationship to an organization. Values are Pending, Active, Inactive, Terminated.

statusDate.description: The date on which the worker's status changed.

reasonCode.description: The reason for the work relationship status.
